projectDescription: AI-powered sourcing and profit-tracking app for eBay resellers — photograph any item or full shelf to get instant HOT/LIST/SKIP decisions with real profit math, then manage inventory, generate listings, and track P&L from one app.
keyFeatures: AI Profit Scanner — photo or text input → eBay sold comps → HOT / LIST / SKIP decision with real profit math after fees
Shelf Scan — one wide photo of a whole shelf; every visible item ranked by profit potential
Inventory — cost, sell price, status, photos, SKU auto-generation, synced to account
AI Listing Generator — titles, descriptions, condition notes, eBay categories from photos
Profit Hub — P&L dashboard, expenses, mileage logging, subscription management
Profit Compass — AI business brief with market trends, hunt list, stale item actions
Photo Agent — crop, enhance, background removal for listing photos
CSV Export — eBay Seller Hub bulk upload + full JSON backup/restore
Configurable profit math — eBay fee %, packaging cost, shipping, ROI target, tax reserve, IRS mileage rate
Freemium tiers — Scout (free, 25 scans/mo), Hustle ($19/mo), Stack ($49/mo), Empire ($199/mo)
publicApiSurface: POST /auth/register — create account with email + password
GET /auth/verify — verify email from inbox link
supabase.functions.invoke('claude-proxy') — AI scan analysis (single item + shelf)
